html:
Chat

Generate chat completions.

Request

POST /api/chat

Request Body

{
  "model": "literati-7b",
  "messages": [
    {"role": "user", "content": "Hello!"}
  ]
}

Response

{
  "model": "literati-7b",
  "message": {
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "Hello! How can I help you today?"
  },
  "done": true
}
